# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

parameters:
- name: storageAccountNamePrefix
  type: string  
  defaultValue: "storacc"    
variables:   
 resourcesGroupName : "[resourceGroup().name]"          # (1)        
 location : "West Europe"#(2)"       
 appServicePlanID:"[concat('appserviceplan',parameters('storageAccountNamePrefix'))]",  (#3 )      
 webAppIdQualifier: ""    
 storageConnectionString: "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;StorageAccountName=', parameters('storageaccountname'), ';EndpointSuffix=core.windows.net')]"   #(4)          
  azure_sqlDBServerID : "your-dbserverid"             (#5 )   
  sqlDatabaseArmId: ""                     (6, set in deployment scripts to use earlier setup's ARM id for the DB server).    
appServiceName:"[concat(parameters('storageAccountNamePrefix'),'-web')]"         #2       3-7         8          9                10      & 4   .chars)], 'West Europe', [{variables('sqlDBConnectionString')}]), ['westeurope'])      
}   
resources:    
 - provider: "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"        #2-6          7              8         9           10      & 4   .chars)], 'West Europe', [{variables('appServiceName')}]), ['westeurope'])       ]         }    },    
 {             "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",                #3-7             8              9         10      & 4   .chars)], 'West Europe', [{variables('appServiceName')}]), ['westeurope'])       ]         }    },    
 {             type: Microsoft Azure RM Provider,            (5          6-7             8              9         10      & 4   .chars)], 'West Europe', [{variables('sqlDBConnectionString')}]), ['westeurope'])       ]         }    },
